lab.name: ARC Lab
lab.description: We develop theories, algorithms, and tools for the design and analysis of autonomous, reliable, and cyber-physical systems. Our research spans formal methods, machine learning, and control theory.
lab.objective: The ARC Lab focuses on building rigorous foundations for safe and reliable autonomous systems. We combine formal verification, machine learning, and control theory to tackle hard open problems in cyber-physical systems, robotics, and intelligent infrastructure.
lab.joinText: We are always looking for motivated students and research assistants to join our team. If you are passionate about formal methods or autonomous systems, we'd love to hear from you.
